Print method for an object of class gesearch

Source: R/print.gesearch.R
print.gesearch.Rd

Prints the content of an object of class gesearch

Usage

# S3 method for class 'gesearch'
print(x, ...)

Arguments

x

an object of class gesearch (as returned by the gesearch function).

...

arguments to be passed to methods (not functional).

Author

Leonardo Ramirez-Lopez

On this page
